zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Isabella Westwick於1243年出生在英國越可爾克雷文時，她的父親Serlonis de Westwick27歲，母親Agnes of Grassington26歲。她於大約1266年與Robert de Plumpton在英國英格蘭越可爾格拉辛頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1340年在英國英格蘭越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾享年97歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Isabella Westwick于1243年出生在英国越可爾克雷文时，她的父亲Serlonis de Westwick27岁，母亲Agnes of Grassington26岁。她于大约1266年与Robert de Plumpton在英国英格兰越可爾格拉辛頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1340年在英国英格兰越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾享年97岁。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Westwick (Durham, Essex, Norfolk, WR Yorks).

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Isabella Westwick was born in 1243, in Craven, Yorkshire, England, her father, Serlonis de Westwick, was 27 and her mother, Agnes of Grassington, was 26. She married Robert de Plumpton about 1266, in Grassington, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1340, in Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 97.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Isabella Westwick est née en 1243, à Craven, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Serlonis de Westwick, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Agnes of Grassington, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Plumpton environ 1266, à Grassington, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1340, à Plumpton by Ecclesall, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 97 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Isabella Westwick 1243 in Craven, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Serlonis de Westwick 27 und ihre Mutter Agnes of Grassington 26. Sie hat um 1266 in Grassington, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Robert de Plumpton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1340 im Alter von 97 Jahren in Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Isabella Westwick è nata il nel 1243 nel Craven, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Serlonis de Westwick, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Agnes of Grassington, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Plumpton circa 1266, nel Grassington, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1340, nel Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 97 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Isabella Westwickが1243年にイギリスヨークシュアイアクラベンで生まれた時，父Serlonis de Westwickは27歳，母Agnes of Grassingtonは26歳であった。約1266年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアグラシントンでRobert de Plumptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1340年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアプルンプトン ビー エククレサルで97歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Isabella Westwick(이)가 1243년 영국 요르크실르 크레이븐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Serlonis de Westwick(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes of Grassington(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1266년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 그래징턴에서 Robert de Plumpton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1340년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플럼프턴 비 c클사에서 97세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Isabella Westwick nasceu em 1243, em Craven, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Serlonis de Westwick, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Agnes of Grassington, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Plumpton aproximadamente 1266, em Grassington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1340, em Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 97 anos.

ru.Plumpton,Yorkshire,England: плумптон би экклесалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Plumpton, Yorkshire, England: плумптон би экклесалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, Englan: плумптон би экклесалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Isabella Westwick родилась в 1243 г. в местности кравен, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Serlonis de Westwick было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes of Grassington, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Plumpton около 1266 г. в местности грассингтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1340 г. в местности плумптон би экклесалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 97 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Isabella Westwick nació en 1243, en Craven, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Serlonis de Westwick, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Agnes of Grassington, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Robert de Plumpton aproximadamente 1266, en Grassington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1340, en Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 97 años.
